steps.text:
• Choice A: $1 + \left(\dfrac{55}{2}\right)^2$ - wrong coefficient (missing the 2) and wrong denominator. Incorrect.
  • Choice B: $1 + 2\left(\dfrac{55}{4}\right)^2$ - matches the vertex value exactly. That matches choice B - B is correct.
  • Choice C: $1 - 2\left(\dfrac{55}{4}\right)^2$ - subtracts instead of adds, which would give a minimum, not a maximum. Incorrect.
  • Choice D: $1 - 2\left(\dfrac{55}{2}\right)^2$ - wrong sign and wrong denominator. Incorrect.
